name: 9ui-command
title: Command
description: Provides a searchable command list with grouped items, keyboard navigation, and an optional modal presentation.
author: borabaloglu

changes: Changed the dialog and cn imports from upstream aliases to source-local relative paths and changed the shortcut margin to a logical RTL-aware utility.
Renamed the internal support file, changed Base UI and cn imports to portable source-local subpaths, and replaced physical right/text-left utilities with logical RTL-aware utilities.

license.scope: apps/www/src/components/ui/command.tsx, apps/www/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx, and apps/www/src/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Repointed local aliases to copied support files and changed ml-auto to ms-auto.
modifications.reason: Keep the item self-contained and preserve shortcut alignment in both LTR and RTL directions.

modifications.change: Renamed the support target, used the Base UI dialog subpath and copied cn helper, and changed right/text-left utilities to end/text-start.
modifications.reason: Avoid a generic public Dialog target while keeping the copied closure portable and RTL-aware.

name: 9ui-meter
title: Meter
description: Displays a labeled scalar value within a known range using semantic meter markup.
author: borabaloglu

changes: Changed the cn import from the upstream alias to the copied source-local helper and stopped forwarding root-only props and className to the meter track.

license.scope: apps/www/src/components/ui/meter.tsx and apps/www/src/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Repointed the cn alias to the copied helper and removed root props and className from Meter.Track.
modifications.reason: Keep the item self-contained while preventing duplicate IDs, ARIA attributes, value props, and root styling on the visual track.

name: animata-card-stack
title: Card Stack
description: Cycles a caller-provided stack of cards with click or optional autoplay transitions.
author: Animata

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Changed the reduced-motion hook import from @/hooks/use-prefers-reduced-motion to ../../hooks/use-prefers-reduced-motion for the same source-batch and registry-target portability.
Removed unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports; retained the upstream cn helper required by this item.

license.scope: animata/card/card-stack.tsx, hooks/use-prefers-reduced-motion.ts, and lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Changed the cn and reduced-motion hook imports from root aliases to ../../lib/utils and ../../hooks/use-prefers-reduced-motion.
modifications.reason: Resolve the bundled upstream support files from both the source batch and installation target.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the upstream cn export used by these components.

name: animata-disclose-image
title: Disclose Image
description: Reveals a caller-provided image with paired sliding panels after it loads.
author: Animata

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Added an explicit client boundary and replaced the fixed outer dimensions with a responsive aspect frame that inherits its width from the caller's parent layout.
Preserved caller onLoad handlers, replaced tw-animate-css-only entrance utilities with core transform transitions, and hid the disclosure panels under reduced motion.
Removed unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports; retained the upstream cn helper required by this item.

license.scope: animata/image/disclose-image.tsx and lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Changed the cn import to ../../lib/utils, added an explicit client boundary, replaced fixed dimensions with a parent-sized responsive aspect frame, preserved caller onLoad handlers, replaced plugin-only entrance utilities with core transform transitions, and added a reduced-motion panel fallback.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and responsive while preserving its paired-panel reveal without requiring undeclared animation CSS or forcing motion-sensitive users through the transition.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the upstream cn export used by these components.

name: animata-sibling-focus-nav
title: Sibling Focus Nav
description: Dims or blurs sibling links while one navigation item is hovered or keyboard-focused.
author: Animata

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Removed unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports; retained the upstream cn helper required by this item.

license.scope: animata/container/sibling-focus-nav.tsx and lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
modifications.reason: Resolve the bundled upstream utility from both the source batch and installation target without relying on a consumer root alias.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the upstream cn export used by these components.

name: animata-swap-text
title: Swap Text
description: Swaps between two caller-provided text values on click or hover.
author: Animata

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Added an explicit client boundary.
Exposed only the visually current phrase as the button accessible name, marked visual duplicates aria-hidden, and exposed persistent click state with aria-pressed.
Reduced the transform from 1000ms to 300ms, added a reduced-motion path, and synchronized optional hover behavior with keyboard focus while disabling hover-only behavior when clicks are disabled.
Removed unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports; retained the upstream cn helper required by this item.

license.scope: animata/text/swap-text.tsx and lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Changed the cn import to ../../lib/utils, added a client boundary, made the current phrase the sole accessible name with aria-pressed state, shortened the transition, added reduced-motion handling, and synchronized hover with keyboard focus.
modifications.reason: Preserve the authored two-phrase swap while making its visible state semantic, its optional hover behavior keyboard-equivalent, and its motion bounded and suppressible.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the upstream cn export used by these components.

name: beui-bloom-menu
title: Bloom Menu
description: Morphs a compact trigger into a caller-supplied action palette with a radial reveal.
author: Saurabh Chauhan

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Removed upstream demo items and their icons from runtime; callers now supply every action.
Added configurable labels, dialog semantics, explicit focus entry and exit-complete restoration, controls linkage, hidden decorative icons, and visible focus styles.
Moved item blur interpolation off the spring to prevent invalid negative blur values.

license.scope: components/motion/bloom-menu.tsx, lib/ease.ts, lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports, removed embedded demo content, completed focus and dialog behavior, and bounded blur interpolation.
modifications.reason: Ship a reusable component rather than source-owned sample data while keeping keyboard users inside a clear interaction flow.

name: beui-cylinder-carousel
title: Cylinder Carousel
description: Rolls caller-provided items around a responsive concave or convex cylindrical projection.
author: Saurabh Chauhan

changes: Changed the project utility alias to its bundled relative import.
Added an accessible carousel name and live item position, replaced application role with group, and mapped arrow navigation for RTL.
Stopped active glide controls and cleared the pending wheel timer during unmount.
Guarded pointer capture when synthetic accessibility input has no active pointer.
Normalized the malformed indentation around the upstream return block.

license.scope: components/motion/cylinder-carousel.tsx, lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import and tightened semantics, RTL keys, pointer capture, cleanup, and formatting.
modifications.reason: Install portably without leaking animation work and expose the custom interaction without application-mode semantics.

name: beui-hold-action
title: Hold Action

name: cooldown-action
title: Cooldown Action
description: Runs a caller-provided action, then makes it available again after an accurate bounded cooldown.
author: Tanmay Sharma & Simran Gupta

changes: Converted the PropTypes class source to TypeScript while preserving its existing duration, label, style, class, options, and resend props under the generic Cooldown Action name.
Derived the displayed remainder from an end timestamp, paused scheduled updates while the document is hidden, reconciled duration changes, and cleared the timeout and visibility listener on unmount.
Awaited the real resend callback, prevented duplicate activation, restarted cooldown only after fulfillment, and left failed actions available with a polite one-time status.
Removed hard-coded font, color, border, and typography defaults; added a non-submitting native button, static pending feedback, explicit non-live countdown, and a minimum touch target.

license.scope: src/timer.js
notices: The pinned upstream LICENSE has trailing spaces on 12 lines; the local evidence copy removes only that trailing whitespace without changing the legal text.

modifications.change: Mechanically typed and generically named the class, replaced decrementing intervals with an end-time scheduler, added visibility and duration reconciliation, awaited and guarded the real action lifecycle, exposed concise status, and removed visual defaults while retaining existing source props.
modifications.reason: Keep cooldown time correct through tab throttling, make caller success or failure authoritative, preserve native keyboard and form behavior, avoid repeated announcements, honor static reduced-motion behavior, and keep the source-copy API intact.

name: primer-segmented-progress

changes: Clamped finite progress and aria-valuenow inputs to 0 through 100 and normalized invalid inputs to zero.
Added a fallback fill color when the host does not define the requested Primer color token.
Added local fallback values for the three Primer track and radius tokens.
Scoped forced-color tokens to the component and forced each inline item fill variable to LinkText.

license.scope: packages/react/src/ProgressBar/ProgressBar.tsx, packages/react/src/ProgressBar/ProgressBar.module.css, and packages/react/src/ProgressBar/index.ts

modifications.change: Clamped progress values and added a fallback for generated Primer fill tokens.
modifications.reason: Prevent visual and ARIA overflow from invalid caller values and render without a Primer theme provider.

modifications.change: Added track token fallbacks and scoped the forced-colors overrides to the component classes.
modifications.reason: Keep the CSS module portable while ensuring inline fill variables cannot defeat Windows forced colors.

modifications.change: Guarded click-focus and keyboard movement when disabled, and synchronized the default transition with reduced-motion preference after hydration.
modifications.reason: Make the upstream aria-disabled state match actual focus and keyboard behavior while preserving its motion-safe default in server-rendered React hosts.

modifications.change: Removed the catch binding, noConsole suppression, and console.debug call while retaining graceful failure.

modifications.change: Changed touch-action from pan-y to pan-x for portrait orientation while retaining pan-y for landscape.
modifications.reason: Allow the gesture axis to reach the slider while preserving page scrolling on the perpendicular axis.

name: react-pull-to-refreshify
title: Pull to Refreshify
description: Refreshes caller-owned content through a scroll-boundary-aware pull gesture or an explicit accessible action.
author: liaoliao666

changes: Added the client boundary, a visible native Refresh fallback that uses the same refresh dispatcher, pending and disabled state, aria-busy, and one polite atomic caller-owned status.
Retained the controlled refreshing and completion state machine while adding an immediate dispatch latch, cancellable completion timer, cancel reset, and synchronous callback error recovery.
Ignored horizontal and off-boundary drags, used the current viewport height for bounded resistance, and preserved an immediate threshold when threshold is zero.
Limited transitions to transform, removed them under reduced motion, marked the changing visual status presentation-only, and inherited its text color.
Added optional refreshButtonLabel and renderStatus props without changing the existing required API.
Deferred passive-listener detection until a browser event path calls it and removed the temporary detection listener.
Accepted a not-yet-resolved scroll parent, guarded DOM globals for server evaluation, normalized page roots, and clamped overscroll bounce below zero.
Typed native mouse events and the host ref, ignored secondary mouse and multi-touch starts, and added a distinct cancellation callback.
Captured mouse move and release on window, cancelled on touchcancel, pointercancel, blur, or hidden document state, and removed every global listener on unmount.
Removed server-time window initialization and resolved the nearest actually scrollable ancestor after mount.

Prevented native overscroll only for downward vertical pulls inside the content, skipped interception while disabled, re-resolved on resize or orientation and observed size changes, and cleaned every observer and listener.

license.scope: lib/PullToRefreshify.tsx, lib/types.ts, and the complete lib/utils runtime closure

modifications.change: Added the client boundary, explicit native refresh fallback, busy and live semantics, duplicate-dispatch and completion-timer guards, drag cancellation, scroll-axis gating, viewport-based bounded resistance, and reduced-motion-safe transform transitions while retaining the upstream state machine and renderText options.
modifications.reason: Meet the documented SSR, keyboard, assistive-technology, threshold, controlled-refresh, cancellation, cleanup, and reduced-motion gates without replacing the source interaction engine.

modifications.change: Added optional refreshButtonLabel and renderStatus props.
modifications.reason: Keep the required explicit action label and concise live status caller-owned while preserving every existing prop.

modifications.change: Made passive-event detection lazy and server-safe and removed its temporary listener.
modifications.reason: Allow Next server evaluation and avoid retaining a detection listener.

modifications.change: Guarded DOM access, accepted an unresolved parent, normalized page roots, and clamped negative overscroll.
modifications.reason: Keep server evaluation safe and make the top-boundary check reliable for page and nested scrolling.

modifications.change: Added primary-input checks, a distinct cancel path, window mouse capture, pointer/touch/blur/hidden cancellation, and complete listener cleanup.
modifications.reason: Complete drags released outside the element, never refresh after cancellation, and remove global work when hidden or unmounted.

modifications.change: Made scroll-parent discovery client-only and based on actual overflow, limited native-scroll interception to vertical downward pulls, added disabled handling and resize/orientation re-resolution, and cleaned listeners and observation.
modifications.reason: Preserve nested and page scrolling until the real top boundary while remaining correct across mobile viewport changes and unmounts.

name: uilayouts-liquid-glass
title: Liquid Glass
description: Renders an optionally draggable or expandable glass surface with an SVG displacement filter.
author: UI LAYOUT

changes: Removed @ts-nocheck by typing the copied Motion props and changed the utility import to ../../lib/utils.
Generated a unique SVG filter ID per instance and marked filter layers decorative.
Changed draggable to opt in so the default surface has no pointer-only motion.
Replaced click and synthetic-button behavior on the content wrapper with a native expansion button carrying aria-expanded.
Limited hover and tap scaling to explicit drag mode and retained reduced-motion behavior.
Normalized formatting.
Retained only the upstream cn helper and removed site configuration, URLs, and unrelated timing helpers.

license.scope: apps/ui-layout/components/ui/liquid-glass.tsx and apps/ui-layout/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Typed the source, rewired its local utility, scoped SVG filter IDs, hid decorative layers, made drag opt in, moved expansion to a native button, and limited motion under reduced-motion or non-draggable defaults.
modifications.reason: Allow multiple instances, preserve type safety, avoid default pointer-only motion, and prevent arbitrary child controls from being nested inside a synthetic button.

modifications.change: Removed unrelated site configuration and timing helpers, retaining cn only.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove site URLs.

name: uilayouts-progressive-carousel
title: Progressive Carousel
description: Provides direct slide selection with optional timed progress and a controlled pause state.
author: UI LAYOUT

changes: Added the client boundary and changed the root-alias utility import to ../../lib/utils.
Made autoplay opt-in with autoPlay defaulting to false and added a controlled paused prop for a stable external pause/resume control.
Paused opted-in autoplay while offscreen, hidden, hovered, or keyboard-focused while allowing an explicit fast-forward selection to complete, and stopped autoplay for reduced motion.
Fixed fast-forward progress timing and made reduced-motion slide selection immediate.
Marked the visual progress fill decorative and exposed the active control with aria-pressed.
Normalized formatting.
Retained only the upstream cn helper and removed site configuration, URLs, and unrelated timing helpers.

license.scope: apps/ui-layout/components/ui/progressive-carousel.tsx and apps/ui-layout/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Added a client boundary and local import, made autoplay opt-in, exposed a controlled paused prop, corrected fast-forward timing, paused autoplay when hidden or engaged without blocking direct selection, added reduced-motion behavior, and clarified control semantics.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied carousel portable, prevent unsolicited or unstoppable motion, and give callers a stable pause/resume control contract.

modifications.change: Removed unrelated site configuration and timing helpers, retaining cn only.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove site URLs.

name: yarl-lightbox
title: Yet Another React Lightbox
description: Opens caller-provided images in an accessible modal gallery with keyboard, pointer, touch, RTL, and responsive-image support.
author: Igor Danchenko

changes: Added a React client boundary so the hook-based lightbox is safe to install in React Server Component projects.
Added a local render-component type bridge for React 19 polymorphic JSX without changing runtime behavior.
Compiled the upstream styles.scss entry and its _common.scss dependency to the official 3.32.1 published CSS output, then normalized the trailing newline.

license.scope: The core files under src excluding src/plugins, plus src/styles.scss and its src/_common.scss dependency.

modifications.change: Added a use client directive.
modifications.reason: Expose the hook-based upstream component as a safe client boundary in Next.js and other React Server Component projects.

modifications.change: Compiled the upstream Sass entry to the official 3.32.1 CSS output and normalized its trailing newline.
modifications.reason: Ship the exact visual skin without requiring every registry consumer to install and configure Sass.

modifications.change: Added a local render-component type bridge for React 19 polymorphic JSX without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Keep the original polymorphic API while compiling the upstream React 18-era generic JSX against React 19 types.
